params.workbook: Workbook name. Uses the active workbook if omitted
params.sheet: Sheet name. Uses the active sheet if omitted

create.title: Create Workbook
create.description: Creates a new empty workbook. Saves immediately if savePath is specified.

params.savePath: Absolute path to save (.xlsx). Not saved if omitted

open.title: Open Workbook
open.description: Opens a workbook by file path. Activates it if already open.

params.filePath: Absolute path to Excel file (e.g. C:\docs\data.xlsx)

save.title: Save Workbook
save.description: Saves the workbook. Use savePath for Save As.

close.title: Close Workbook
close.description: Closes the workbook. Use save option to save before closing.

getActive.title: Active Workbook Info
getActive.description: Returns name, path, sheet count, and active sheet name of the current workbook.

listOpen.title: List Open Workbooks
listOpen.description: Returns names and paths of all workbooks currently open in Excel.

list.title: List Sheets
list.description: Returns all sheet names in the workbook.

params.name: New sheet name
params.after: Add after this sheet. Appends to end if omitted

copy.title: Copy Sheet
copy.description: Copies a sheet within the same workbook.

params.newName: Name for the copy. Auto-named if omitted

readCell.title: Read Cell
readCell.description: Returns the value, formula, and display text of a single cell.

writeCell.title: Write Cell
writeCell.description: Writes a value or formula to a single cell. Treated as formula if it starts with '='.

readRange.title: Read Range
readRange.description: Returns cell values as a 2D array. Reads entire UsedRange if range is omitted. Auto chunked parallel read for large data.

params.range: Range address (e.g. A1:C10). UsedRange if omitted
params.chunkSize: Chunk size in rows. Parallel read if rows >= this value. Default 30

writeRange.title: Write Range
writeRange.description: Writes 2D array data starting from a cell. Large data is accelerated via auto chunked parallel writes.

params.data: 2D array data. Each inner array is one row
params.chunkSize: Chunk size in rows. Parallel write if rows >= this value. Default 30

readRangeFormulas.title: Read Range Formulas
readRangeFormulas.description: Returns formulas as a 2D array. Returns values for cells without formulas. Auto chunked parallel read for large data.

params.range: Range address (e.g. A1:C10). UsedRange if omitted

clearRange.title: Clear Range
clearRange.description: Clears content, formats, or everything in a range.

params.mode: What to clear: values, formats, or all

formatRange.title: Format Range
formatRange.description: Applies formatting to a range. Font (name/size/bold/italic/color), background, alignment, borders, number format, etc.

params.borderEdges: Per-edge border control. Takes priority over border

setColumnWidth.title: Set Column Width
setColumnWidth.description: Sets column width. Use 'auto' for auto-fit.

setRowHeight.title: Set Row Height
setRowHeight.description: Sets row height. Use 'auto' for auto-fit.

mergeCells.title: Merge/Unmerge Cells
mergeCells.description: Merges or unmerges a cell range.

readCellFormat.title: Read Cell Format
readCellFormat.description: Returns current formatting of a cell. Includes font, background, alignment, borders, merge status.

writeCellFormat.title: Write Cell Format
writeCellFormat.description: Applies formatting using the same structure as read_cell_format output. Works on ranges too.

copyPasteRange.title: Copy/Paste Range (Values & Formulas)
copyPasteRange.description:
Copies values or formulas to a destination.
Does not use the system clipboard, so it runs safely in parallel.

⚠️ This tool copies only values or formulas.
Use excel_copy_paste_format for formatting.

params.destSheet: Destination sheet. Same sheet if omitted
params.pasteType: values: computed values only. formulas: original formulas

copyPasteFormat.title: Copy/Paste Format
copyPasteFormat.description:
Copies formatting (font, color, borders, number format, etc.) to a destination.
Uses the system clipboard, so other operations are temporarily blocked.

⚠️ This tool copies formatting only.
Use excel_copy_paste_range for values/formulas.
Call both sequentially to copy everything.

params.destSheet: Destination sheet. Same sheet if omitted

findReplace.title: Find/Replace
findReplace.description: Finds or replaces text in a sheet. Find-only if replace is omitted.

params.range: Search range. Entire sheet if omitted

sortRange.title: Sort Range
sortRange.description: Sorts a range by a specified column.

params.hasHeader: Whether first row is a header

autoFilter.title: Auto Filter
autoFilter.description: Sets or removes auto filter on a range. Applies filter criteria if specified.

params.toggle: Toggle filter (remove if exists, add if not)
params.field: Column number to filter (1-based within range)

insertDeleteRowsCols.title: Insert/Delete Rows & Columns
insertDeleteRowsCols.description: Inserts or deletes rows or columns.

params.index: Row number (1-based) or column number/letter (1 or 'A')
params.count: Number of rows/columns to insert or delete

list.title: List Tables
list.description: Returns name, range, style, and row/column count of all tables (ListObjects) in the sheet.

create.title: Create Table
create.description: Converts a range into an Excel table (ListObject).

edit.title: Edit Table
edit.description: Changes table name, style, or size, or adds rows/columns.

params.name: Table name
params.addRow: Add a row at the bottom

delete.title: Delete Table
delete.description: Removes the table (ListObject). Data is preserved unless clearData is true.

create.title: Create Chart
create.description: Creates a chart from a data range.

params.title: Chart title
params.position: Chart position cell (e.g. F1). Auto if omitted

create.title: Create Pivot Table
create.description: Creates a pivot table from a data range.

params.destCell: Pivot table location (e.g. F1 or Sheet2!A1)
params.name: Pivot table name

dataValidation.title: Data Validation
dataValidation.description: Sets input rules for cells. Restrict with dropdown lists, number ranges, text length, etc.

params.formula: list: comma-separated values (e.g. 'A,B,C') or range ref. whole/decimal: min value. custom: formula

conditionalFormat.title: Conditional Formatting
conditionalFormat.description: Adds conditional formatting rules. Use 'clear' type to remove existing rules.

params.fontColor: Font color RGB hex when condition is met
params.bgColor: Background color RGB hex when condition is met

insert.title: Insert Image
insert.description: Inserts an image file into the sheet. The image is embedded in the Excel file, so it persists even if the original file is deleted.

params.filePath: Absolute image path (PNG, JPG, BMP, GIF)
params.width: Width in px. Original size if omitted
params.height: Height in px. Original size if omitted
params.name: Shape name. Auto if omitted
params.keepAspect: Maintain aspect ratio when only width or height is specified

list.title: List Images
list.description: Returns a list of images (Pictures) inserted in the sheet.

manage.title: Manage Image
manage.description: Delete, move, or resize an inserted image. Use excel_list_images to find image names.

params.name: Image (Shape) name
params.keepAspect: Maintain aspect ratio when only width or height is specified

errors.moveCellRequired: Cell parameter is required for move.
errors.resizeDimensionRequired: Width or height is required for resize.

exportRange.title: Export Range as Image
exportRange.description:
Exports a cell range as an image file (PNG/JPG/BMP/GIF).
Uses the system clipboard, so other operations are temporarily blocked.

insert.title: Add VBA Module
insert.description:
Adds a VBA module and inserts code.
⚠️ 'Trust access to the VBA project object model' must be enabled in Excel Options > Trust Center > Macro Settings.
⚠️ Save as .xlsm to preserve VBA.

list.title: List VBA Modules
list.description:
Returns VBA module list. Includes source code if name is specified.
⚠️ 'Trust access to the VBA project object model' must be enabled.

params.name: Specific module name. Returns code if specified

manage.title: Manage VBA Module
manage.description:
Delete, replace code, or append code to a VBA module.
Document modules (Sheet/ThisWorkbook) cannot be deleted; only their code is cleared.
⚠️ 'Trust access to the VBA project object model' must be enabled.

params.name: Module name
params.action: delete, replace (replace all code), or append (add to end)

messages.codeCleared: Document module cannot be deleted; code cleared only

freezePanes.title: Freeze Panes
freezePanes.description: Freezes or unfreezes panes at a cell position. Rows above and columns to the left are frozen.

params.cell: Freeze anchor cell (e.g. B3 → rows 1-2, column A frozen). Unfreezes if omitted

namedRange.title: Manage Named Ranges
namedRange.description: List, create, or delete named ranges.

poolStatus.title: Session Pool Status
poolStatus.description:
Returns the current state of the PowerShell session pool.
Session count, busy/alive status, queue length, and processing statistics.

cancelQueued.title: Cancel Queued Tasks
cancelQueued.description:
Cancels queued tasks.
Specify taskId to cancel one task, or omit to cancel all.
Running tasks cannot be cancelled.
Use excel_pool_status to see queued task IDs.

params.taskId: Task ID to cancel. Cancels all if omitted

messages.notFound: Task #{id} not found (already running or completed)

errors.documentModuleDeleteNotice: Document module cannot be deleted; code cleared only
